sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(l1.id) FROM sys_operationlog_t l1 LEFT JOIN sys_menu_t m2 on l1.menuId=m2.id AND m2.validflag > 0 WHERE 1=1
m2.menuname like '%$menuname$%'
l1.operation like '%$operation$%'
l1.operator like '%$operator$%'
DATE_FORMAT(l1.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= DATE_FORMAT(l1.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d')

SELECT l1.*,IFNULL(m2.menuname,'ć— ') menuname FROM sys_operationlog_t l1 LEFT JOIN sys_menu_t m2 on l1.menuId=m2.id AND m2.validflag > 0 WHERE 1=1
m2.menuname like '%$menuname$%'
l1.operation like '%$operation$%'
l1.operator like '%$operator$%'
DATE_FORMAT(l1.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= DATE_FORMAT(l1.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY l1.operationTime DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO sys_operationlog_t (menuId,operation,operator,operationTime,operationResult,memo,operatedept) VALUES ($menuId$,'$operation$','$operator$','$operationTime$','$operationResult$','$memo$','$operatedept$') SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS ID
sqlMap.select:
select count(*) from (SELECT l1.id,l1.operator,l1.operation,l1.menuId,l1.operationTime,l1.operationResult,l1.memo,m2.menuname,m2.parentId,l1.operatedept FROM sys_operationlog_t l1,sys_menu_t m2 WHERE l1.menuId=m2.id AND m2.validflag > 0)A left join sys_menu_t m on m.id=A.parentId where m.menuName like '%$parentmenuname$%'
A.menuname like '%$menuname$%'
A.operation like '%$operation$%'
A.operator like '%$operator$%'
A.operatedept like '%$operatedept$%'
DATE_FORMAT(A.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= DATE_FORMAT(A.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d')

select A.* from (SELECT l1.id,l1.operator,l1.operation,l1.menuId,l1.operationTime,l1.operationResult,l1.memo,m2.menuname,m2.parentId,l1.operatedept FROM sys_operationlog_t l1,sys_menu_t m2 WHERE l1.menuId=m2.id AND m2.validflag > 0)A left join sys_menu_t m on m.id=A.parentId where m.menuName like '%$parentmenuname$%'
A.menuname like '%$menuname$%'
A.operation like '%$operation$%'
A.operator like '%$operator$%'
A.operatedept like '%$operatedept$%'
DATE_FORMAT(A.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d') >= '$startTime$'
'$endTime$' >= DATE_FORMAT(A.operationTime,'%Y-%m-%d')
ORDER BY A.operationTime DESC
